name: roadmap-gps
description: Creates and maintains per-project roadmaps at ~/.notes-context/roadmap/{name}.md using a Now/Next/Later horizon model. Use when the user wants to plan a project roadmap, update an existing roadmap, review project direction, or asks what to work on next.
instructions:
See skills/roadmap-gps/SKILL.md for full instructions.

Summary: Requires /project-start to have been run first — reads ~/.notes-context/projects/{name}/project-context.md for project name and context. Roadmap lives at ~/.notes-context/projects/{name}/roadmap.md. Infer the active project from the current directory (CONTEXT.md name → directory name → ask). Grill dependencies first, then urgency, to place Deliverables into Now/Next/Later horizons. Always show a diff summary and ask for confirmation before writing. Encode timestamps as inline HTML comments (ISO 8601). Blocked Deliverables stay in Now.
